summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 4 warning, 9 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:69,75,82` — Pre-flight exit(1) errors use `tsLog` (stdout) instead of `tsError` (stderr), inconsistent with failure-path error handling at L153-164. Not blocking since crontab merges both streams.
🟡 `tasks/task-6/artifacts/` — No test-output.txt artifact captured for this task; evidence relies on task-5's artifact

🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:159-160` — Error messages posted to GitHub issue comments are truncated but unsanitized. `err.message` may leak file paths, stack traces, or environment details to anyone with read access on public repos. Consider a generic failure message with a pointer to `cron.log`.

🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:128-132` — The `process.exit` monkey-patch is fragile. If `runSingleFeature` ever adds a blanket try/catch, the intercepted throw gets swallowed silently. Document the coupling or consider `AbortController` signals.
